I agree with the original conclusion. The auriculotemporal nerve consistently runs parallel to and encircles the superficial temporal artery in the parieto-temporal region, particularly just before it branches into the scalp. This close spatial relationship makes the superficial temporal artery the correct answer among listed choices.
